intended_tool_observations: list fixture files; parse FastQC modules; inspect failed/warn modules; extract basic statistics; compare QC policy thresholds; emit structured decision
verifier_focus: Require evidence for failed per-base quality, per-tile quality, per-base N content, sequence duplication, and adapter content; forbid inventing unread metrics.
why_meaningful: Real sequencing QC over a public report; the agent reasons over biological data quality rather than code.
known_risk: This is a report-level task, not raw FASTQ processing; acceptable for v0 but later should include command-generated FastQC output.

source_pin: 10x Genomics object last-modified 2017-06-02; content-length 7621991; companion web summary URL verified
public_artifacts: 10x PBMC3k filtered matrix tarball; optional web summary; fixture may include derived QC table generated by a locked Scanpy script
intended_tool_observations: list fixture files; inspect sample metadata; compute or replay Scanpy QC table; identify high/low count outliers; apply threshold policy; emit structured decision
verifier_focus: Require evidence for cell/gene counts, total_counts or n_genes_by_counts thresholds, and affected cell/sample ids; forbid using uncited thresholds.
why_meaningful: Real scRNA-seq QC over a canonical public dataset; closer to scientific data review than issue triage.
known_risk: Needs a locked fixture-generation script before baseline; do not rely on live 10x download during replay.

intended_tool_observations: list fixture files; parse FCS keyword metadata; parse compensation matrix; compare fluorescence channels to matrix channels; check marker label coverage; emit structured decision
verifier_focus: Require evidence for FCS channels FL1-H/FL2-H/FL3-H/FL4-H/FL1-A, compensation matrix channels FL1-H..FL4-H, and missing marker labels; forbid plot/vision judgment.
why_meaningful: Domain-relevant FlowCyto path without image interpretation; validates metadata/state tool calls before gating or vision tasks.
known_risk: Needs an FCS metadata parser tool in the fixture; raw FCS file should be vendored or checksummed for replay.

source_pin: RCSB PDB 1AKE mmCIF HTTP 200 verified 2026-05-29; data API reports X-ray method and resolution_combined [2]
public_artifacts: RCSB mmCIF for adenylate kinase complex 1AKE; optional RCSB entry JSON
intended_tool_observations: list fixture files; parse mmCIF metadata; inspect experimental method and resolution; detect AP5 ligand; inspect polymer/non-polymer entities; emit preparation decision
verifier_focus: Require evidence for X-ray diffraction, 2.0 A resolution, AP5 ligand, polymer/non-polymer entity counts, and structure id; forbid inventing docking suitability beyond metadata.
why_meaningful: Real protein structure prep triage over a public mmCIF; meaningful but still text/table-first and deterministic.
known_risk: Not protein design yet; it is a structure-readiness fixture. Later tasks should add binding-site checks or mutation/design constraints.

public_artifacts: Qualimap BamQC genome_results.txt with mapped reads, aligned bases, mean mapping quality, and coverage metrics
intended_tool_observations: list fixture files; parse Qualimap report sections; extract mapped reads, aligned bases, mean mapping quality, and coverage; compare QC policy; emit structured decision
verifier_focus: Require evidence for 98.23% mapped reads, 0 aligned bases, mean mapping quality 0.1184, and mean coverage 0.0024X; forbid calling it a clean pass based only on mapped-read percentage.
why_meaningful: Real workflow-result interpretation over sequencing alignment QC outputs; not a software bug or issue-classification task.
known_risk: Verifier must define the policy threshold so the task is not subjective.
